name: Date Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275-300 degrees.
2. Grease a 6x10 inch pan.
3. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
4. Add vanilla extract to the mixture.
5. Beat in egg yolks one at a time.
6. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and salt.
7. Mix in chopped dates and nuts.
8. Fold in beaten egg whites until just combined.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 45 minutes or until set.
